dsl_rule.translation_notes: Interpreted 'previous day's highest high' as a 24-hour lookback period, approximated using Donchian Channel upper (dc_upper) which captures the highest high over a rolling window. The signal specifies a Buy Stop order on an hourly (60-minute) bar timeframe when price breaks above the previous day's high. Used dc_upper as a proxy for the highest high of the previous trading day. Exit condition set to a reasonable reversal (close below Donchian middle) since AUTHOR_SILENT was specified.

backtest_rule.reason: Interpreted 'previous day's highest high' as a 24-hour lookback period, approximated using Donchian Channel upper (dc_upper) which captures the highest high over a rolling window. The signal specifies a Buy Stop order on an hourly (60-minute) bar timeframe when price breaks above the previous day's high. Used dc_upper as a proxy for the highest high of the previous trading day. Exit condition set to a reasonable reversal (close below Donchian middle) since AUTHOR_SILENT was specified.

source_rule_text: Buy when the high of the hourly bar moves above the highest high of the hourly bars of the previous day using a Buy Stop order.
